message:
test(engine): strengthen Clone isolation tests with bidirectional field assertions

Add assertions on the cloned struct's mutated field values in 6 Clone
isolation tests to verify that mutations on the clone actually took
effect (not just that the original was unaffected). This catches
potential Clone implementations that silently discard mutations.

Tests updated: evidence_artifact_clone_isolates_fields,
scoring_result_clone_isolates_fields,
evidence_config_clone_isolates_fields,
evidence_error_clone_isolates_fields,
approval_signature_clone_isolates_fields,
milestone_evidence_integration_output_clone_isolates_fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
